title: find_matches default limit=50 silently truncates and docstring says 'most recent first' while results are oldest-first
evidence: soccer_mcp/repository.py:148-151 sorts ascending by match_date then returns results[-limit:]; server.py:77 docstring claims 'most recent first' but the returned slice is oldest-to-newest
suggestion: Reverse the slice for most-recent-first, or fix the docstring; consider surfacing a truncated flag when len(results) exceeds limit

title: Deduplicates overlapping match sources to avoid double/triple-counting aggregates
evidence: soccer_mcp/data_loader.py:263-293 _SOURCE_PRIORITY + _dedupe_overlapping_sources keeps one authoritative source per competition/season
suggestion: None — this is a correctness improvement beyond the spec; keep it

title: Extended per-match stats (corners, shots, half-time results) captured from BR-Football-Dataset
evidence: soccer_mcp/data_loader.py:150-158 stores extra stats on Match.extra
suggestion: None — captured but not yet exposed via a dedicated tool; could add a stats tool
